creator: ccowart@rescomp.berkeley.edu
text:
Is there any additional troubleshooting I can perform or debugging
information I can provide? I have 12 servers with this hardware
configuration and some 7.0 features I'd really like to use.

Just to clarify, I'm running 7.0-RELEASE, and the missing drives issue
has not been resolved (as it was in RC2 for the original reporter).

Thanks,

-- 
Chris Cowart
Network Technical Lead
Network & Infrastructure Services, RSSP-IT
UC Berkeley
